input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule V.2.1.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: v.2.1.2
            TITLE: the driver’s head and hands must not contact the ground in any rollover attitude.

            CONTENT:
            rule V.2.1.2: The driver’s head and hands must not contact the ground in any rollover attitude.
V.2.1.2 The driver’s head and hands must not contact the ground in any rollover attitude.

final_answer: The driver’s head and hands must not contact the ground in any rollover attitude.
